#
sysname SW-MISSING-DESCS
#
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 port link-type trunk
 port trunk allow-pass vlan 100
#
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/2
 description TENHO-DESCRICAO
 port link-type access
 port default vlan 20
#
interface Eth-Trunk1.100
 vlan-type dot1q 100
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.252
#
interface Eth-Trunk1.200
 description TENHO-DESCRICAO-SUB
 vlan-type dot1q 200
 ip address 10.0.1.1 255.255.255.252
#
interface LoopBack0
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.255
#
ip route-static 10.200.0.0 255.255.255.0 10.0.0.2
ip route-static 10.201.0.0 255.255.255.0 10.0.1.2 description ROTA-COM-DESCR
#
return
